warps.notes: South entrance — returns to Indigo Plateau Pokecenter
North exit left tile — leads to Koga's Room. Locked until Will is defeated.
North exit right tile — leads to Koga's Room. Locked until Will is defeated.

notes: Map is 10 tiles wide x 18 tiles tall (5x9 blocks).
Will stands at (5,7) facing down — center of the room.
The north door at y=2 (tiles 4,2 and 5,2) starts as a wall ($2a block). It changes to open door ($16 block) after Will is defeated.
The south entrance at y=14 (tile 4,14) is changed to wall ($2a) immediately after the player enters (WillsRoomDoorLocksBehindYouScript). This locks the player in.
WillsRoom_EnterMovement walks the player UP 4 steps after entering.
The room uses the Elite Four chamber tileset — dark stone, ornate decorations.
Scene SCENE_WILLSROOM_LOCK_DOOR triggers on entry; after door locks, scene changes to SCENE_WILLSROOM_NOOP.

trainers.name: Will
trainers.intro_dialogue: Welcome to Pokemon League, <PLAYER>. Allow me to introduce myself. I am WILL. I have trained all around the world, making my psychic Pokemon powerful. And, at last, I've been accepted into the ELITE FOUR. I can only keep getting better! Losing is not an option!
trainers.post_defeat_dialogue: Even though I was defeated, I won't change my course. I will continue battling until I stand above all trainers! Now, <PLAYER>, move on and experience the true ferocity of the ELITE FOUR.

events.name: LockDoorBehindPlayer
events.description: SCENE_WILLSROOM_LOCK_DOOR fires sdefer WillsRoomDoorLocksBehindYouScript. Player is walked UP 4 steps automatically, a rumble/earthquake sound plays, and the south entrance door tile at (4,14) is changed to wall ($2a block). EVENT_WILLS_ROOM_ENTRANCE_CLOSED is set. Scene changes to SCENE_WILLSROOM_NOOP.

events.name: OpenExitDoor
events.description: After Will is beaten, EVENT_BEAT_ELITE_4_WILL is set. The north door tiles at (4,2) and (5,2) change to open ($16 block). EVENT_WILLS_ROOM_EXIT_OPEN is set. Player can then proceed to Koga's Room.

events.name: WillsRoomDoorsCallback
events.description: On every map tile refresh: if EVENT_WILLS_ROOM_ENTRANCE_CLOSED is set, forcibly applies the wall block at (4,14). If EVENT_WILLS_ROOM_EXIT_OPEN is set, forcibly applies the open door block at (4,2). This ensures door states persist correctly across map reloads.

notes: Will is Elite Four member #1, specializing in Psychic-type Pokemon. His room features the standard Elite Four locking-door mechanic: entering seals the south door behind the player, and defeating Will opens the north door to Koga's Room. His team is entirely Psychic-type. Xatu appears twice — the second at a higher level (42) is his lead-out 'ace' after the others fall. Will was formerly a Gym Leader candidate who trained internationally before earning his Elite Four position. Prize money: $4200 (base 25 × highest level 42 × 4).
